textByHashes.061409f9923d7b214500dab060b8635a8d54dd53: Sorry soldier, you don't have permission to speak with me yet. Go and talk to the Captain.
textByHashes.3bba5769afff60fdd914e96c9b9c1cba1e6ecae3: Well, that depends upon your skill levels for each role.
textByHashes.fd21248971316537633d9bae63cdb8857a2c0f1c: Okay. What exactly do you want to know, ?
textByHashes.938d57a3cf9dd66faf719e4399cdc4590a78229f: You have absolutely no points, whatsoever. Best you get back into that arena!
textByHashes.930d9d128cc29b30fc037491c14b145e9295f1fb: You have: Attacker Honour Points, Defender Honour Points, Collector Honour Points and Healer Honour Points.
textByHashes.6404408d1598daf8590227ce3e5ee4ec0efaff61: Well, you can come back and get one at any time from me.
textByHashes.b2f0fc79eb1bf28056a3f076cb880ca9ba246e30: You do realise that you're already on wave one?
textByHashes.14172be41a8bef67beffdfa3800239b6c2c24f02: Gamble, you say! Let me take something from my big bag of prizes!
textByHashes.0cfdac2e37ded8123ea449d8e12df8e36dc187de: Lucky dip, you say! Let me take something from my big bag of prizes!
textByHashes.6fcb34be8d5ec88961bd3b69a29b48d0fb53e2bd: I've got my hand on something!
textByHashes.eff8d1106301d365b09047edc6928024db22bc6a: Don't you want it anymore? I'll buy it back off you for points in each of the four roles.
